---
title: "Italian Industrial Production"
subtitle: "Tidy Tuesday Submission for 2026-05-05"
date: 2026-05-05
author: Ntobeko Sosibo
toc: false
toc-location: left
toc-title: "Outline"
toc-depth: 6
format:
  html:
    mainfont: "Roboto"
    page-layout: article
    grid:
      sidebar-width: 50px
      body-width: 3840px
      margin-width: 25px
      gutter-width: 4rem
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="www/icons/favicon.png">
    embed-resources: true
    self-contained: true
execute:
  freeze: auto
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

## Going over the main questions  

xx  

### Which industries have increased production, and which have decreased?  

xx  

### How has the average weight per ship changed over time?  

xx  

&nbsp;  

&nbsp;  


```{r}
#| code-fold: true
#| label: industrial-italy
#| fig-width: 12
#| fig-height: 17
#| echo: true
#| eval: true
#| message: true
#| warning: false

#loading libraries
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(readr)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(stringr)
  library(lubridate)
  library(echarts4r)
  library(htmltools)
  library(htmlwidgets)
  library(webshot2) # for exporting the presentation panel as a high resolution image
  })

# bringing in the data data
food_beverages_padded <- read.csv("data/food_beverages_padded.csv")
textiles_padded <- read.csv("data/textiles_padded.csv")
transport_padded <- read.csv("data/transport_padded.csv")

# introducing the colour palette

# generating the charts
# food and beverages chart
food_beverages_output <- food_beverages_padded |>
  e_charts(
    Year,
    height = 360
    ) |>
  e_heatmap(
    product,
    pop,
    itemStyle = list(
      borderColor = "#ffffff", 
      borderWidth = 3         
      )
    ) |>
  e_visual_map(
    show = FALSE,
    pop,
    orient = "horizontal",
    calculable = TRUE,
    inRange = list(
      color = c("#e8e3e2", "#ff1000ff")
      ),
    min = min(food_beverages_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(food_beverages_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    outOfRange = list(
      color = "#fff"
      )
    ) |>
  e_grid(
    left = 380,
    right = 5,
    top = 65,
    bottom = 5
    ) |>
  e_x_axis(
    show = FALSE
    ) |>
  e_y_axis(
    show = TRUE,
    inverse = FALSE, 
    axisLabel = list(
    margin = 20, 
    fontFamily = "Plus Jakarta Sans",
    fontSize = 22,
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS(
          "function (value, index) {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
    return value
      .replace('_pop', '')
      .replace(/_/g, ' ')
      .split(' ')
      .map((word, i) => {
        if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
          return word.toLowerCase();
        }
        return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
      })
      .join(' ');
  }
  return value;
}"
        )
    ),
    axisLine = list(show = FALSE),
    axisTick = list(show = FALSE)
    ) |>
  e_mark_line(
    data = list(xAxis = "1943"), 
    symbol = c("circle", "circle"),
    symbolSize = c(8, 8),          
    lineStyle = list(
      color = "#443",           
      width = 3,                   
      type = "dashed",              
      opacity = 0.8
      ),
    label = list(
      show = TRUE,
      formatter = "1943 Allied Invasion",              # Or your custom text
      position = "end",                # Puts it at the top
      fontSize = 36,                   # This is the size control
      fontWeight = "bold",             # This makes it heavy
      fontFamily = "Plus Jakarta Sans",
      color = "#ff1000ff",
      distance = 25                    # Space between the circle and text
    )
    ) |>
  e_tooltip(
    trigger = "item",
    backgroundColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
    borderRadius = 12,
    padding = list(14, 16),
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS("
  function(params) {
    var p = params;
    var rawProduct = p.value[1]; // Grabs the 'sugar_pop' style name
    var val = p.value[2];
    var year = p.name; 

    // Reusable formatting logic for the Product Name
    var formatProduct = function(str) {
      if (typeof str !== 'string') return str;
      var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
      return str
        .replace('_pop', '')
        .replace(/_/g, ' ')
        .split(' ')
        .map((word, i) => {
          if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
            return word.toLowerCase();
          }
          return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
        })
        .join(' ');
    };

    var product = formatProduct(rawProduct);

    return '<div>' +
      // Chart Group Title
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans;font-size:26px;font-weight:normal;margin-bottom:20px; padding-top: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">' +
        'Food and Beverages' +
      '</div>' +
      
      // Cleaned Product Name
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; font-size:35px; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:30px;  padding-left: 20px; color:#333;\">' +
        product +
      '</div>' +
      
      // The Central Spine Grid
      '<div style=\"display:grid; grid-template-columns: max-content min-content 1fr; column-gap:26px; font-size:34px; font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; align-items: center;\">' +
      
        // Row 1: Year
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">Year</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:20px; color:#333; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + year + '</b></div>' +

        // Row 2: Percentage of Peak
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:40px; margin-left: 20px; font-size:34px; \">Peak %</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:40px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:40px; color:#333; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + val + '%</b></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }
")
    ) 

# textiles chart
textiles_output <- textiles_padded |>
  e_charts(
    Year,
    height = 410
    ) |>
  e_heatmap(
    product,
    pop,
    itemStyle = list(
      borderColor = "#ffffff", 
      borderWidth = 3         
      )
    ) |>
  e_visual_map(
    show = FALSE,
    pop,
    orient = "horizontal",
    calculable = TRUE,
    inRange = list(
      color = c("#e8e3e2", "#ab263cff")
      ),
    min = min(textiles_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(textiles_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    outOfRange = list(
      color = "#fff"
      )
    ) |>
  e_grid(
    left = 380,
    right = 5,
    top = 5,
    bottom = 5
    ) |>
  e_x_axis(
    show = FALSE
    ) |>
  e_y_axis(
    show = TRUE,
    inverse = FALSE, 
    axisLabel = list(
    margin = 20, 
    fontFamily = "Plus Jakarta Sans",
    fontSize = 22,
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS(
          "function (value, index) {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
    return value
      .replace('_pop', '')
      .replace(/_/g, ' ')
      .split(' ')
      .map((word, i) => {
        if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
          return word.toLowerCase();
        }
        return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
      })
      .join(' ');
  }
  return value;
}"
        )
    ),
    axisLine = list(show = FALSE),
    axisTick = list(show = FALSE)
    ) |>
  e_mark_line(
    data = list(xAxis = "1943"), 
    symbol = c("circle", "circle"),
    symbolSize = c(8, 8),          
    lineStyle = list(
      color = "#443",           
      width = 3,                   
      type = "dashed",              
      opacity = 0.8
      ),
    label = list(show = FALSE)      # Keep it clean
    ) |>
  e_tooltip(
    trigger = "item",
    backgroundColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
    borderRadius = 12,
    padding = list(14, 16),
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS("
  function(params) {
    var p = params;
    var rawProduct = p.value[1]; // Grabs the 'sugar_pop' style name
    var val = p.value[2];
    var year = p.name; 

    // Reusable formatting logic for the Product Name
    var formatProduct = function(str) {
      if (typeof str !== 'string') return str;
      var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
      return str
        .replace('_pop', '')
        .replace(/_/g, ' ')
        .split(' ')
        .map((word, i) => {
          if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
            return word.toLowerCase();
          }
          return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
        })
        .join(' ');
    };

    var product = formatProduct(rawProduct);

    return '<div>' +
      // Chart Group Title
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans;font-size:26px;font-weight:normal;margin-bottom:20px; padding-top: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">' +
        'Textiles' +
      '</div>' +
      
      // Cleaned Product Name
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; font-size:35px; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:30px;  padding-left: 20px; color:#333;\">' +
        product +
      '</div>' +
      
      // The Central Spine Grid
      '<div style=\"display:grid; grid-template-columns: max-content min-content 1fr; column-gap:26px; font-size:34px; font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; align-items: center;\">' +
      
        // Row 1: Year
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">Year</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:20px; color:#333; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + year + '</b></div>' +

        // Row 2: Percentage of Peak
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:40px; margin-left: 20px; font-size:34px; \">Peak %</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:40px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:40px; color:#333; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + val + '%</b></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }
")
    ) 

# transport chart
transport_output <- transport_padded |>
  e_charts(
    Year,
    height = 460
    ) |>
  e_heatmap(
    product,
    pop,
    itemStyle = list(
      borderColor = "#ffffff", 
      borderWidth = 3         
      )
    ) |>
  e_visual_map(
    show = FALSE,
    pop,
    orient = "horizontal",
    calculable = TRUE,
    inRange = list(
      color = c("#e8e3e2", "#E3735E")
      ),
    min = min(textiles_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    max = max(textiles_padded$pop, na.rm = TRUE),
    outOfRange = list(
      color = "#fff"
      )
    ) |>
  e_grid(
    left = 350,
    right = 5,
    top = 5,
    bottom = 5
    ) |>
  e_x_axis(
    show = TRUE,
    nameLocation = "middle",
    nameGap = 150,
    axisLabel = list(
    margin = 20, 
    fontFamily = "Plus Jakarta Sans",
    fontSize = 22
    ),
    axisLine = list(show = FALSE),
    axisTick = list(show = TRUE)
    ) |>
  e_y_axis(
    show = TRUE,
    inverse = FALSE, 
    axisLabel = list(
    margin = 20, 
    fontFamily = "Plus Jakarta Sans",
    fontSize = 22,
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS(
          "function (value, index) {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
    return value
      .replace('_pop', '')
      .replace(/_/g, ' ')
      .split(' ')
      .map((word, i) => {
        if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
          return word.toLowerCase();
        }
        return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
      })
      .join(' ');
  }
  return value;
}"
        )
    ),
    axisLine = list(show = FALSE),
    axisTick = list(show = FALSE),
    ) |>
  e_mark_line(
    data = list(xAxis = "1943"), 
    symbol = c("circle", "circle"),
    symbolSize = c(8, 8),          
    lineStyle = list(
      color = "#443",           
      width = 3,                   
      type = "dashed",              
      opacity = 0.8
      ),
    label = list(show = FALSE)      # Keep it clean
    ) |>
  e_tooltip(
    trigger = "item",
    backgroundColor = "rgba(255,255,255,0.8)",
    borderRadius = 12,
    padding = list(14, 16),
    formatter = htmlwidgets::JS("
  function(params) {
    var p = params;
    var rawMode = p.value[1]; // Grabs the '_pop' style name
    var val = p.value[2];
    var year = p.name; 

    // Reusable formatting logic for the Transport Mode Name
    var formatMode = function(str) {
      if (typeof str !== 'string') return str;
      var minorWords = ['and', 'or', 'of', 'the', 'with'];
      return str
        .replace('_pop', '')
        .replace(/_/g, ' ')
        .split(' ')
        .map((word, i) => {
          if (i > 0 && minorWords.includes(word.toLowerCase())) {
            return word.toLowerCase();
          }
          return word.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + word.slice(1).toLowerCase();
        })
        .join(' ');
    };

    var mode = formatMode(rawMode);

    return '<div>' +
      // Chart Group Title
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans;font-size:26px;font-weight:normal;margin-bottom:20px; padding-top: 20px; padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; color:#666;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:1px;\">' +
        'Transport' +
      '</div>' +
      
      // Transport Mode Name
      '<div style=\"font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; font-size:35px; font-weight:bold; margin-bottom:30px;  padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px; color:#333;\">' +
        mode +
      '</div>' +
      
      // The Central Spine Grid
      '<div style=\"display:grid; grid-template-columns: max-content min-content 1fr; column-gap:26px; font-size:34px; font-family:Plus Jakarta Sans; align-items: center;\">' +
      
        // Row 1: Year
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">Year</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:20px; color:#333; margin-bottom:30px; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + year + '</b></div>' +

        // Row 2: Percentage of Peak
        '<div style=\"text-align:right; color:#666; margin-bottom:40px; margin-left: 20px; font-size:34px; \">Peak %</div>' +
        '<div style=\"opacity:0.6; margin-bottom:40px; font-size:34px;\">:</div>' +
        '<div style=\"margin-bottom:40px; color:#333; font-size:34px;\"><b>' + val + '%</b></div>' +
      '</div>' +
    '</div>';
  }
")
    ) 

# presentation base container (this is the canvass)
istat_final_viz <- 
  htmltools::tagList(
  tags$div(
    style = "

      background-color: white;
      padding: 50px;
      margin-left: 50px;
      margin-right: 50px;
      margin-bottom: 40px;
      margin-top: 40px;
      ",

    # responsive flexbox that istat logo and headline
tags$div(
  style = "
    display: flex; 
    flex-wrap: wrap; 
    gap: 30px; 
    align-items: flex-start; 
    width: 100%;
  ", 
  
  # Icon wrapper - Width now matches the image inside
  tags$div(
    style = "
      flex: 0 0 150px;
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column;
      margin-bottom: 45px;
      margin-right: 75px;
    ",
    tags$img(
      src = "images/icons/mi_istats_logo.png",      
      width = "290px",               
      height = "auto", # maintains aspect ratio
      style = "display: block;"
    )
  ), 

  # Headline and subtitle wrapper
  tags$div(
    style = "
      flex: 1;
      min-width: 400px; 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column;
      padding-bottom: 20px;
    ",
    # Title
    tags$div(
      style = "text-align:left; margin-bottom: 15px; font-family: 'Charis SIL'; font-weight: 950; line-height: 1.1;",
      HTML(
        "<span style='color:#334; font-size:76px;'>A CENTURY OF CHANGE: <span style='color:#ff1000ff; font-size:76px;'> 1943 </span> AS THE AXIS OF ITALIAN INDUSTRIAL </span> <span style='color:#ab263cff; font-size:76px;'> RESILIENCE </span> <span style='color:#334; font-size:76px;'> AND REINVENTION. A LOOK AT PERCENTAGE OF PEAKS.</span>"
      )
    ),
    # Subtitle
    tags$div(
      style = "text-align:left; font-family: 'Roboto'; font-size:46px; font-weight: 300; color:#888; line-height:1.4; margin-bottom:30px;",
      HTML(
        "A distinct gap can be observed across <b>Food and Beverages</b>, a disruption likely caused by the <b>1943 Allied Invasion</b>. While <b>Textiles</b> remained Italy's most resilient industry for nearly a century, the post-war era signaled a permanent structural decline in <i>Raw Silk</i> and <i>Flock Yarn</i> failing to regain their pre-invasion momentum. <b>Transport</b> reflects a pivot toward modern scale, with the average weight per ship steadily increasing as maritime production consolidated."
      )
    )
  )
),
    
    



# responsive flexbox that holds the three charts
tags$div(
  style = "
    display: flex; 
    flex-wrap: wrap; 
    gap: 10px; 
    align-items: flex-start; 
    width: 100%;
  ",
  
  # food and beverages chart wrapper
  tags$div(
    style = "
      flex: auto; 
      width: 100%; 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column;
    ",
    
    # food and beverages chart title
    tags$div(
      "FOOD AND BEVERAGES",
      style = "font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans'; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; color: #ff1000ff; text-align: left; margin-bottom: 10px;"
    ),
    
    # chart placeholder (you could have put the complete code here too, like the line chart)
    food_beverages_output
  ),
  
  # textiles chart wrapper
  tags$div(
    style = "
      flex: auto; 
      width: 100%; 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column;
    ",
    
    # textiles chart title
    tags$div(
      "TEXTILES",
      style = "font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans'; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; color: #ab263cff; text-align: left; margin-bottom: 10px;"
    ),
    
    # chart placeholder (you could have put the complete code here too, like the line chart)
    textiles_output
  ),
  
  # transport chart wrapper
  tags$div(
    style = "
      flex: auto; 
      width: 100%; 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column;
    ",
    
    # transport chart title
    tags$div(
      "TRANSPORT",
      style = "font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans'; font-size: 32px; font-weight: bold; color: #E3735E; text-align: left; margin-bottom: 10px;"
    ),
    
    # chart placeholder (you could have put the complete code here too, like the line chart)
    transport_output
  )
), # closing responsive flexbox that holds both charts


# start of page footer with data and author details
tags$div(
      style = "text-align: center; margin-top: 100px; margin-bottom: 10px;",
    

  tags$span(
    "Data Source :",
    style = "color: #888; text-decoration: none; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans; font-weight: 450; font-size: 26px"),

  # tidy tuesday repo link
  tags$a(
    "ISTAT (Istituto nazionale di statistica / Italian National Institute of Statistics) via Tidy Tuesday (2026-05-05, Week 19)",
    href = "https://github.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/tree/main/data/2026/2026-04-14",
    target = "_blank",
    style = "color: #ab263cff; text-decoration: none; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans; font-weight: bold; font-size: 30px"
    ),

  HTML("&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;"),

  # linkedin logo
  tags$img(
    HTML('<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="#ab263cff" class="bi bi-linkedin" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
  <path d="M0 1.146C0 .513.526 0 1.175 0h13.65C15.474 0 16 .513 16 1.146v13.708c0 .633-.526 1.146-1.175 1.146H1.175C.526 16 0 15.487 0 14.854zm4.943 12.248V6.169H2.542v7.225zm-1.2-8.212c.837 0 1.358-.554 1.358-1.248-.015-.709-.52-1.248-1.342-1.248S2.4 3.226 2.4 3.934c0 .694.521 1.248 1.327 1.248zm4.908 8.212V9.359c0-.216.016-.432.08-.586.173-.431.568-.878 1.232-.878.869 0 1.216.662 1.216 1.634v3.865h2.401V9.25c0-2.22-1.184-3.252-2.764-3.252-1.274 0-1.845.7-2.165 1.193v.025h-.016l.016-.025V6.169h-2.4c.03.678 0 7.225 0 7.225z"/>
</svg>')
    ), 

  # linkedin link
  tags$a(
    "  Ntobeko Sosibo  ",
    href = "https://www.linkedin.com/in/ntobeko-sosibo/",
    target = "_blank",
    style = "margin-left: 20px; color: #888; text-decoration: none; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans; font-weight: 450; font-size: 30px"
    ),
  
  HTML("&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;"),

  # github logo
  tags$img(
    HTML(
      '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="#ab263cff" class="bi bi-github" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
  <path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27s1.36.09 2 .27c1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.01 8.01 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8"/>
</svg>'
    )
  ),
  
  # github link
  tags$a(
    "afrikaniz3d-za",
    href = "https://github.com/afrikaniz3d-za",
    target = "_blank",
    style = "margin-left: 20px; color: #888; text-decoration: none; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans; font-weight: 450; font-size: 30px"
    ),
  
  HTML("&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp;"), 

  # bluesky logo
  tags$img(
    HTML(
      '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="40" height="40" fill="#ab263cff" class="bi bi-bluesky" viewBox="0 0 16 16">
  <path d="M3.468 1.948C5.303 3.325 7.276 6.118 8 7.616c.725-1.498 2.698-4.29 4.532-5.668C13.855.955 16 .186 16 2.632c0 .489-.28 4.105-.444 4.692-.572 2.04-2.653 2.561-4.504 2.246 3.236.551 4.06 2.375 2.281 4.2-3.376 3.464-4.852-.87-5.23-1.98-.07-.204-.103-.3-.103-.218 0-.081-.033.014-.102.218-.379 1.11-1.855 5.444-5.231 1.98-1.778-1.825-.955-3.65 2.28-4.2-1.85.315-3.932-.205-4.503-2.246C.28 6.737 0 3.12 0 2.632 0 .186 2.145.955 3.468 1.948"/>
</svg>'
    )
    ),

  # bluesky link
  tags$a(
    "afrikaniz3d",
    href = "https://bsky.app/profile/afrikaniz3d.bsky.social",
    target = "_blank",
    style = "margin-left: 20px; color: #888; text-decoration: none; font-family: Plus Jakarta Sans; font-weight: 450; font-size: 30px"
    )
  ) # closing page footer with data and author details
)
)

istat_final_viz

#------------------------------------------------------
# exporting the presentation as a high resolution image
#------------------------------------------------------
  
# writing the html file directly to the project folder
 htmltools::save_html(istat_final_viz, "istat_final_render.html")


# webshot "takes" a picture of the html file, saving it in the same directory
webshot2::webshot(
  url = "istat_final_render.html",
  file = "Italian_production_Final.png",
  vwidth = 3840,   
  vheight = 1920,
  delay = 4,       # extra time for any animations to complete playing
  zoom = 2         # double pixel density for sharpness
  )

```
